title: Rajani Heart Embossed Coir Door Mat - 40 x 60 cm Non-Slip Entrance Mat for Indoor and Outdoor Use
features: Heart Embossed Design - Adds a decorative and welcoming touch to your home�s entrance.
description: Heart Embossed Coir Door Mat - 40 x 60 cm Non-Slip Entrance Mat for Indoor and Outdoor Use Introduction Keep your floors clean while adding a charming touch to your entryway with this Heart Embossed Coir Door Mat. Made from durable coir with stiff bristles, it effectively brushes off dirt, dust, and mud from footwear. Ideal for indoor or outdoor use, this mat combines functionality with a decorative embossed heart design, making it a stylish and practical addition to any doorstep. Key Features Durable Coir Construction - Made from high-quality coir for long-lasting performance and effective dirt removal. Heart Embossed Design - Adds a decorative and welcoming touch to your home's entrance. Stiff Bristles - Efficiently remove dirt, dust, and mud from shoes, keeping your floors cleaner. Non-Slip Backing - Helps keep the mat securely in place for safe use on various surfaces. Suitable for Indoor and Outdoor Use - Perfect for doorsteps, porches, or entryways. Product Specifications Material Coir Colour Natural/Brown Size 40 x 60 cm Usage Ideal for door entryways, patios, or indoor entrances Finish This Heart Embossed Coir Door Mat combines practicality and style, keeping your home clean while creating a welcoming first impression. Its durable bristles and charming design make it an essential addition to any doorway.
